systems.public_reference: Stam et al., Clinical Neurophysiology 118, 2317 (2007); Breakspear, Nature Neuroscience 20, 340 (2017)

systems.normalisation: precision graph weights scaled to unitless positive Kuramoto couplings
systems.public_reference: Friston, Nature Reviews Neuroscience 11, 127 (2010); Buckley et al., Entropy 19, 318 (2017)

systems.normalisation: per-unit susceptance converted to Kuramoto coupling by V_i V_j B_ij / (2 H_i omega_0)
systems.public_reference: IEEE PES public test feeder / Stagg-El-Abiad 5-bus benchmark constants

decision.ibm_rationale: No IBM job is required for this gate unless K_nm is redefined as a QPU-device coupling-map claim. The current gap asks for measured system coupling magnitudes, not additional shot data.
decision.next_gate: Promote one candidate only after a locked measured-system normalisation and per-edge uncertainty model are committed, or provide data/knm_physical_validation/measured_couplings.json with system name, units, normalisation, uncertainty, and source per edge.

sibling_scpn_codebase.error: disabled: SCPN-CODEBASE is archived/outdated and not an audit authority

measured_system_comparison.normalisation: K_ij = V_i V_j / X_ij for public case14 branches; absent branches are zero. This is a network-admittance candidate, not an inertia-normalised swing-equation candidate, because measured per-bus inertias are not supplied for every bus.

edge_value_permutation.description: Seeded permutations of measured upper-triangle edge values; preserves measured value distribution.

null_models.gate_rule: Promotion requires topology and magnitude diagnostics to beat preregistered nulls and still pass per-edge uncertainty checks.

node_label_permutation.description: Measured-system node relabellings; exhaustive for small systems and seeded sampled permutations for larger systems. Preserves measured graph weights and degree sequence.

signal_processing.conversion: public branch reactance and voltage magnitudes to symmetric admittance coupling

known_limitations: no measured per-bus inertia constants for all load buses
source_dataset.name: IEEE 14-bus MATPOWER case14 benchmark constants
source_dataset.source_reference: MATPOWER case14 / IEEE 14-bus public benchmark data

critical_coupling_response.model: dimensionless Kuramoto threshold proxy; for fixed oscillator distribution, critical coupling is proportional to 1 / adjacency spectral radius

measured_system_comparison.system: IEEE 14-bus power-grid voltage-weighted admittance coupling matrix

blockers: canonical K_nm values must fall within per-edge uncertainty
direct relative RMSE must be within preregistered tolerance
spectral and critical-response diagnostics must be within tolerance

unit_promotion_status.reason: unit label denotes a physical or model-derived coupling quantity; promotion still requires uncertainty, magnitude, spectral, and null gates
